_comment: See data/README.md for schema. Bump version on non-trivial edits.

saas-dashboard: Data visualization — chart density, legend treatment, color semantics for series
Density toggle — comfortable vs compact row heights, breakpoints where it flips
Command palette — global actions, keyboard entry points, result ranking
Navigation / IA — sidebar vs topbar vs hybrid, section grouping, secondary nav
Empty states — zero data, zero permissions, first-run onboarding moments
Filtering & search — faceted filters, saved views, URL state, query language
Realtime feedback — optimistic updates, inline loading, toast semantics
marketing: Hero composition — typography drama, imagery treatment, above-the-fold density
Scroll choreography — section transitions, reveal timing, parallax vs snap
Typography drama — oversize type, variable weight, editorial pairing
Social proof patterns — logo walls, testimonial cards, case-study tiles
CTA hierarchy — primary/secondary/ghost, repeat points down the page
Motion & transitions — entrance animations, hover affordances, restraint
Dark/light duality — which moments use which, and why
dev-tool: Keyboard-first interactions — shortcut discoverability, modal vs chord
Command palette — fuzzy match, action grouping, inline arguments
Terminal aesthetics — monospace hierarchy, ANSI color mapping, cursor styling
Dense info display — log tailing, stack traces, diff views
Progressive disclosure — collapsed-by-default panels, peek vs dig
Syntax / monospace treatment — code block chrome, copy affordance, line refs
Latency masking — skeleton vs spinner vs optimistic, what suits which action
internal-ops: Data density — rows per viewport, column prioritization, responsive overflow
Bulk actions — selection model, confirmation pattern, undo windows
Keyboard shortcuts — power-user navigation across tables and forms
Filtering system — saved queries, operator syntax, shareable URL state
Table design — sticky headers, inline edit, cell affordances, error states
Batch operations — progress visualization, partial failure handling
Audit / provenance — who-changed-what surfaces, history peek
ecommerce: Product grid — density, imagery crop, hover/quick-view, badge treatment
Cart & checkout flow — step visibility, address autofill, upsell moments
Search & filter — category nav, facets, empty-result recovery, suggestions
Trust signals — reviews, shipping, returns, security, placement rhythm
Imagery treatment — zoom, gallery, 3D/video, loading strategy
Mobile-first flows — thumb reach, sticky CTA, bottom-sheet filters
creative: Canvas / workspace — focus mode, chrome minimalism, panel collapse
Tool palettes — grouping, discoverability, keyboard peek, contextual tools
Modal / dialog design — blocking vs non-blocking, positioning, dismissal
Timeline / layer UI — scrubbing, multi-select, nesting, lock/solo affordances
Color system for content — distinguishing UI chrome from user content
Immersive focus modes — hiding UI, returning from it, signal not noise
Export / share — format choices, preset libraries, pre-flight warnings
game: Menu systems — main menu mood, settings architecture, save/load ergonomics
Reward feedback — micro-animations, sound cues, screen shake discipline
Tutorial flow — in-context prompts, skippability, re-access
HUD / overlay — information density, fade rules, critical-state escalation
Input affordances — controller vs keyboard vs touch, remap surfaces
Reward animations — rarity tiers, pacing, celebration-vs-grind balance
Accessibility — colorblind modes, text scale, reduced motion, input alternatives
docs: Typography system — reading rhythm, heading hierarchy, line length
Code block treatment — syntax theme, copy, line highlight, filename chrome
Navigation — TOC shape, sidebar collapse, breadcrumb, on-page nav
Search — instant results, ranking, scoped search within sections
Cross-references — inline links, 'see also', versioned doc switcher
Content density — callouts, tabs, expandable blocks, when to use which
Mobile reading — nav affordance, sticky TOC vs hamburger, code scroll
unknown: General aesthetic direction — what feeling should the product project
Type system — heading/body scale, numeric/monospace usage
Color palette — surfaces, accents, semantic colors, dark/light
Spacing system — base unit, rhythm, component internal padding
Component patterns — button variants, input states, card styles
Motion language — default durations, easing, when to use what
